description: Master default flag values. All profiles inherit from this and override specific values. Deploys Azure resources with OUT-OF-THE-BOX default settings — no hardening, no forced diagnostics, no encryption configuration. Designed as a baseline for security benchmark testing (CIS, MCSB, etc.).

monitoring.description: Log Analytics Workspace, Application Insights, Action Group. Minimal config — no diagnostic settings forced on other resources.

networking.description: VNet with all subnets pre-reserved. NSGs with no rules (Azure defaults). Optional: Bastion (Developer SKU by default), AppGW, Azure Firewall, VPN Gateway.

security.description: Key Vault (Standard SKU, default settings), User-Assigned Managed Identity. Defender for Cloud Free tier only. No Sentinel by default.

costWarnings.defenderForCloud: Defender for Cloud P2 ~$15/server/month per resource type
costWarnings.sentinel: Microsoft Sentinel pay-per-GB ingestion — major cost driver

compute.description: Windows Server 2022 VM and Ubuntu 22.04 LTS VM with default settings. No disk encryption, no agents, no auto-shutdown by default.

storage.description: General-purpose v2 Storage Account with default Azure settings. No forced HTTPS-only, no TLS minimum, public blob access as Azure defaults.

databases.description: Azure SQL (Serverless, auto-pause), Cosmos DB (serverless), PostgreSQL Flexible Server. All with default settings — no forced TLS, public network access enabled.

costWarnings.sqlManagedInstance: Azure SQL Managed Instance ~$1,000+/month — VERY EXPENSIVE

appservices.description: App Service Plan (B1), Windows Web App, Linux Web App, Function App (Consumption), Static Web App, Logic App. Default settings — no forced HTTPS, no TLS minimum.

containers.description: Azure Container Registry (Basic), AKS (1-node free tier), Container Apps (consumption), Container Instances. Default settings.

integration.description: Service Bus (Standard), Event Hub (Basic), Event Grid, SignalR (Free). API Management off by default (cost). Default settings on all.

ai.description: Azure AI Services, Azure OpenAI, Cognitive Search. All off by default — require quota approval and have unpredictable costs.

costWarnings.openAi: Azure OpenAI pay-per-token — costs vary widely by usage
costWarnings.machineLearning: Azure ML compute cluster costs vary by usage

data.description: Azure Data Factory, Synapse Analytics, Databricks, Microsoft Purview. Off by default due to complexity and cost.

costWarnings.synapse: Azure Synapse Analytics costs vary widely
costWarnings.databricks: Azure Databricks costs vary widely by cluster usage

governance.description: Automation Account (start/stop runbooks), Budget alerts, Resource locks (optional). No Azure Policy assignments by default.
